{{CargoRelic
|name=Interdimensional Electron Channel
|class_id=21688
|rank=SSS
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This is a device that connects different universes, allowing the transmission of matter and energy between them. It was established after scientist Hallam accidentally discovered an exchange of matter with a parallel universe. This exchange can generate enormous energy, solving the energy problems of the human world. However,This technology carries potential risks, and if misused, it could lead to an imbalance of cosmic energy, ultimately causing stars to explode. Faced withThis double-edged sword of technology, humanity must also confront the consequences of greed and ignorance.
|fame=70
|art=52
|fth=73
|civ=60
|tech=107
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10<br>Snail RUSH +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20<br>Snail RUSH +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30<br>Snail RUSH +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50<br>Snail RUSH +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail RUSH +70
|ss6=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100
|ss7=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill3=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
